reviews.comment:
Rápida atención, grande y con espacios para pernoctar con rodantes, lástima que es tan caro comer en sus instalaciones, sanitarios limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Quick service, large, and with spaces for overnight stays with trailers. It's a shame it's so expensive to eat at their facilities. The restrooms are clean.
